title: Ceremony
overview: New student Oliver arrives at Kimberly Magic Academy, a house of learning where 20% of the students don't make it out in one piece.

title: Sword Arts
overview: The new students settle into life at Kimberly, and Oliver has an intense duel with Nanao.

title: Soldier
overview: The new students find themselves trapped in Kimberly at night, with two powerful upperclassmen out to recruit them dead or alive.

title: Colosseum
overview: After Katie is bullied by the other students, her friends end up in a classroom brawl. But that won't be the only fight they see...

title: Glare
overview: Nanao and Oliver face down a powerful foe who has designs on Katie.

title: Arise
overview: Oliver and Nanao battle a powerful mage with an enchanted eye, and the true purpose of Oliver's coming to Kimberly is revealed.

title: Reversi
overview: Oliver and friends attend their first broomriding class. Meanwhile, Pete discovers something unexpected about himself.

title: Rivals
overview: Another student challenges Oliver and his friends to see who's really the strongest of their grade.

title: Explore
overview: Katie is given a workshop, and she and her friends go into the labyrinth to take a look at it.

title: Master and Knight
overview: Oliver and his friends are caught in a brutal team battle against other students deep within the labyrinth.

title: Duty
overview: Oliver and Chela fight a duel deep in the labyrinth, against an opponent who will do anything to avoid defeat.

title: Possibility
overview: Oliver and Chela recruit an unexpected ally to help them venture into the labyrinth and get back Pete.

title: Noisy Forest
overview: Nanao, Oliver, and Chela venture through the labyrinth, encountering strange creatures and deadly threats.

title: Salvadori
overview: As everyone heads deeper beneath the academy, Godfrey and Carlos think back to Ophelia's past.

title: Last Song
overview: Ophelia's plan reaches its climax, trapping Oliver and his friends inside another world where she rules.
